name: Michaels Transportation Svc

fit_notes: NOTE: phone/employee count in source row likely matches a single small branch; actual MTS is a multi-location ESOP-owned CA contractor (Vallejo HQ, ~4 locations, Blue Bird EV early adopter). ESOP ownership makes tuck-in difficult but not impossible (ESOPs do get sold). High-quality CA platform-adjacent asset if approachable.
